mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO orders ( table_id, total_price, pay_status, create_time )
VALUES ( #{tableId}, #{totalPrice}, 0, NOW() )

INSERT INTO order_item ( order_id, dish_id, count, price ,item_status )
VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{dishId}, #{count}, #{price} ,#{itemStatus} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
id, table_id AS tableId, total_price AS totalPrice, pay_status AS payStatus, create_time AS createTime, finish_time AS finishTime
FROM orders
WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE orders
SET
pay_status=1, finish_time=NOW()
WHERE id=#{id}
AND pay_status=0
mapper.select:
select *
from orders
where table_id=#{tableId}
and pay_status=0
order by create_time desc
limit 1
SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.table_id AS tableId, o.total_price AS totalPrice, o.pay_status AS payStatus, o.create_time AS createTime, o.finish_time AS finishTime FROM orders o WHERE o.id=#{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET total_price = GREATEST(0, total_price - #{amount}) WHERE id=#{id} AND pay_status=0
mapper.select:
SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.table_id AS tableId, o.total_price AS totalPrice, o.pay_status AS payStatus, o.create_time AS createTime
FROM orders o
WHERE o.table_id=#{tableId}
AND o.pay_status=0
ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
LIMIT 1
